title: platanthera repens
intro: Platanthera repens, also known as the lesser green orchid or green orchis, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis, and skin conditions, like eczema, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Platanthera repens include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its roots or leaves, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
